headline: [ssot-tb-cocotb] BLOCKED - SSOT/RTL contract needs repair
message:
[ssot-tb-cocotb] BLOCKED - SSOT/RTL contract needs repair
module: arbiter_rr
source: arbiter_rr/yaml/arbiter_rr.ssot.yaml
generator: /Users/brian/Desktop/Project/brian_hw/common_ai_agent/workflow/tb-gen/scripts/emit_goal_scoreboard_cocotb.py
validator: /Users/brian/Desktop/Project/brian_hw/common_ai_agent/workflow/tb-gen/scripts/check_pyuvm_structure.sh
blocker: SSOT/RTL contract is not concrete enough for generic cocotb scoreboard generation.
evidence: arbiter_rr/tb/cocotb/tb_blocked.json
next: Repair SSOT/RTL contract through ATLAS, rerun /ssot-rtl, then rerun /tb.

questions:
- TB_CLOCK_PORT: Declare RTL contract clock 'clk' as an input port.
  recommended: Align rtl_contract.clock with io_list clock_domains[].ports[].name.
- TB_RESET_PORT: Declare RTL contract reset 'rst_n' as an input port.
  recommended: Align rtl_contract.reset with io_list resets[].ports[].name.
- TB_INPUT_MAP_ENABLE: Map transaction field 'enable' to a real input port.
  recommended: Repair rtl_contract.input_map or io_list.
- TB_INPUT_MAP_MASK: Map transaction field 'mask' to a real input port.
  recommended: Repair rtl_contract.input_map or io_list.
- TB_INPUT_MAP_REQUESTS: Map transaction field 'requests' to a real input port.
  recommended: Repair rtl_contract.input_map or io_list.

runs:
- emit_goal_scoreboard_cocotb: exit 2
  cmd: /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/python3 /Users/brian/Desktop/Project/brian_hw/common_ai_agent/workflow/tb-gen/scripts/emit_goal_scoreboard_cocotb.py arbiter_rr --root /Users/brian/Desktop/Project/brian_hw/common_ai_agent
  stdout:
[SSOT QUESTION] tb-gen blocked for arbiter_rr: 5 contract issue(s)
- TB_CLOCK_PORT: Declare RTL contract clock 'clk' as an input port.
- TB_RESET_PORT: Declare RTL contract reset 'rst_n' as an input port.
- TB_INPUT_MAP_ENABLE: Map transaction field 'enable' to a real input port.
- TB_INPUT_MAP_MASK: Map transaction field 'mask' to a real input port.
- TB_INPUT_MAP_REQUESTS: Map transaction field 'requests' to a real input port.

expected artifacts:
- arbiter_rr/tb/cocotb/test_arbiter_rr.py
- arbiter_rr/tb/cocotb/test_runner.py
- arbiter_rr/tb/cocotb/tb_manifest.json
- arbiter_rr/tb/cocotb/tb_generation.json
- arbiter_rr/sim/scoreboard_events.jsonl after /sim
- arbiter_rr/cov/coverage.json after /sim
- arbiter_rr/tb/tb_todo_plan.json
- arbiter_rr/todo/tb_todo_tracker.json
- arbiter_rr/tb/tb_todo_tracker.json

tb_blocked.next_action: Repair SSOT/RTL contract through ATLAS, rerun /ssot-rtl, then rerun /tb.

questions.decision_needed: Declare RTL contract clock 'clk' as an input port.
questions.downstream_effect: cocotb cannot start a clock on a missing DUT signal.
questions.evidence: 'clk' is not in SSOT input ports.

questions.decision_needed: Declare RTL contract reset 'rst_n' as an input port.
questions.downstream_effect: cocotb cannot apply reset to a missing DUT signal.
questions.evidence: 'rst_n' is not in SSOT input ports.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field 'enable' to a real input port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb driver must know which DUT pin receives each FunctionalModel field.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract.input_map.enable='registers_CTRL_enable', but 'registers_CTRL_enable' is not an input port.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field 'mask' to a real input port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb driver must know which DUT pin receives each FunctionalModel field.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract.input_map.mask='registers_REQ_MASK_mask', but 'registers_REQ_MASK_mask' is not an input port.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field 'requests' to a real input port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb driver must know which DUT pin receives each FunctionalModel field.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract.input_map.requests='req_i_NUM_REQ_1_0', but 'req_i_NUM_REQ_1_0' is not an input port.

tb_blocked.reason: SSOT/RTL contract is not concrete enough for generic cocotb scoreboard generation.

runs.label: emit_goal_scoreboard_cocotb
